phrases.text_local: Scusi, quanto costa un biglietto vaporetto?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee KWAN-to KOS-ta oon bee-LYET-to va-po-RET-to

likely_response.translation_en: It costs nine euros and fifty.

responses.english: It costs nine euros and fifty.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dov'è la biglietteria, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwon-JOR-noh doh-VEH lah bee-lyet-teh-REE-ah per fa-VOH-reh

likely_response.local: La biglietteria è a destra, vicino all'ingresso.
likely_response.pronunciation: LAH beej-lee-eht-teh-REE-ah È AH DEH-strah vee-CHEE-noh ahll-'eenj-REH-ssoh
likely_response.translation_en: The ticket office is on the right, near the entrance.

responses.english: The ticket office is on the right, near the entrance.
responses.phonetic: LAH beej-lee-eht-teh-REE-ah È AH DEH-strah vee-CHEE-noh ahll-'eenj-REH-ssoh
responses.french: La biglietteria è a destra, vicino all'ingresso.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, quanto costa un biglietto, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, KWAHN-toh COS-tah oon bee-lyet-toh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: It is indicated at the ticket office.

responses.english: It is indicated at the ticket office.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, come si acquista un ticket, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, KOH-meh see ah-KWEE-stah oon TICK-et, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.local: Alla macchinetta automatica o allo sportello.
likely_response.pronunciation: AHL-lah mahkch-ee-NEHT-tah ah-oo-toh-mah-TEE-kah OH AHL-loh spohr-TEHL-loh
likely_response.translation_en: At the automatic machine or at the counter.

responses.english: At the automatic machine or at the counter.
responses.phonetic: AHL-lah mahkch-ee-NEHT-tah ah-oo-toh-mah-TEE-kah OH AHL-loh spohr-TEHL-loh
responses.french: Alla macchinetta automatica o allo sportello.

phrases.text_local: Scusi, a che ora apre, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee ah keh OH-rah AH-preh pehr fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.local: Gli orari variano, controlli il tabellone.
likely_response.pronunciation: LY oh-RAH-ree vah-ree-AH-noh kohnt-ROHL-lee EEL tah-behl-LOH-neh

responses.phonetic: LY oh-RAH-ree vah-ree-AH-noh kohnt-ROHL-lee EEL tah-behl-LOH-neh
responses.french: Gli orari variano, controlli il tabellone.

phrases.text_local: Scusi, dove sono i bagni, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, DOH-veh SOH-noh ee BAHN-yee, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: On the lower floor, on the left.

responses.english: On the lower floor, on the left.
